name: ujfcorp/doctrack
description: Automated Document Classification and Tracking System for Company Records Management Using Machine Learning (Laravel).
_comment_svm: php-ai/php-ml provides the SVM (SVC) + TF-IDF classifier used by App\Services\ClassificationService, matching the thesis. It uses php-ml's bundled libsvm (no PECL svm extension needed).
_comment_extraction_packages: smalot/pdfparser (pure PHP, always works) and thiagoalessio/tesseract_ocr (PHP wrapper) power TextExtractionService's hybrid pipeline (Scope 1.4). The Tesseract wrapper still needs the system 'tesseract-ocr' binary installed separately (e.g. apt-get install tesseract-ocr) for OCR of images/scanned PDFs to actually run — TextExtractionService degrades gracefully (falls through to a validation_errors message) if that binary is missing.
